untranslatable_reason: EEDT pattern requires manual identification of two distinct peaks with equidistant spacing and calculation of target price using: (highest_high - lowest_low) / 2, then subtract from lowest_low. This multi-bar pattern structure with geometric peak analysis cannot be expressed using available point-in-time indicators. The pattern requires storing historical peak values and comparing them across non-uniform bar distances, which exceeds single-bar indicator capabilities. Recommend implementing as custom pattern detector or using the calculated_target as a placeholder for external pattern engine output.
